# AI Study-to-Work Coach Application Packet

Version: `1.0.0`
Category: USAII Global AI Hackathon 2026 / student_partner_track
Deadline: 2026-06-21 23:59 ET
Production readiness: 100%

## Application Thesis

AI Study-to-Work Coach helps students turn interests, constraints, and current skills into an explainable learning plan, portfolio artifact, opportunity match, and human-approved next step for school-to-career readiness.

## Eligibility Gates

- student_partner_required: Every participant must be an eligible student; working professionals enrolled in degree programs are not eligible. Evidence: `docs/ELIGIBILITY_STUDENT_CHECKLIST.md`.
- student_partner_required: Team must include 2-5 registered Devpost members; no solo final submission. Evidence: `docs/ELIGIBILITY_STUDENT_CHECKLIST.md`.
- ready_for_qualifier: Team must complete the AI Readiness Qualifier and receive an approval code. Evidence: `submission/qualifier_response_template.md`.
- guarded: Substantial competitive build work must happen during June 14-21, 2026. Evidence: `docs/HACKATHON_PLAN.md`.
- done: Submission must explain AI architecture, human-in-loop design, responsible AI guardrails, tools, and data. Evidence: `docs/PRODUCT_AI_IDEA.md`.
- ready: Final Devpost packet must include a working demo or walkthrough and a 3-5 minute pitch video. Evidence: `docs/VIDEO_OUTLINE.md`.
- ready_for_authorized_session: WAIBAv playbooks prepare Devpost and qualifier drafts while preserving authorized final-submit gates. Evidence: `automation/waiba`.

## Milestones

- 0.1.0: Official rules, track fit, and student gates verified (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.3.0: Product idea, qualifier prep, and evidence model (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.6.0: V product core and synthetic readiness report (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.8.0: Vue demo MVP and submission packet (2026-05-30, done).
- 1.0.0: Qualifier and hackathon ready for eligible student team (2026-05-30, done).

## Founder Proof

- Mexico-based software architecture and automation founder with 15+ years across enterprise integrations, fiscal software, ERP workflows, AI automation, cloud delivery, and technical leadership.
